creator: bf1783@googlemail.com
text:
Comparing notes with Wen Heping, I find that I left some NLS files out
of the new pkg-plist in my last patch to upgrade to 2.9.1 and fix
miscellaneous problems.  Please consider instead this third, revised
patch, which adds the missing files and sorts the unwieldy pkg-plist
to ease future additions/removals.

True NOPORTDOCS and NOPORTEXAMPLES support forthcoming in future
revisions -- although why anyone would want to use NOPORTDOCS for this
port must have an eidetic memory...

Thanks,
            b.
